chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 1176 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Hearing For hearing of main case. 16-05-2023 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for respondent-SMC. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant A.G. ***** Learned counsel appearing on behalf of respondents-SMC submits original cheque of Rs. 2,09,098/- dated 12.05.2023 being pension amount payable to the petitioner. Since petitioner is not in attendance, the Accountant of this Court is directed to retain the original cheque and hand over it to the petitioner after proper verification, identification and as per rules. It is categorically stated by learned counsel for the respondents that no amount is payable to the petitioner against the pensionery benefits. Accordingly, this petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
